examples: More than 800 tons of fish have died and rotted on fish farms in a lake near Taal Volcano south of Manila.
A lake of southwest Luzon, Philippines, south of Manila. It contains volcano Island, the site of the active volcano Mount Taal.
Taal , a volcano within a lake within another volcano, is in batangas, where the st. martin of tours basilica, the largest church in the far east, is located.
